reason: Architecture gap scan flags src/detector/matcher.js, src/detector/ollama.js, src/server/cert.js, src/server/httpsServer.js, src/server/middleware.js, and src/cli/ as unspecified — but these files exist and appear to be legitimate implementation additions (HTTPS support, Ollama integration, CLI tooling). Without architecture sign-off, it is unclear whether to remove them or document them.
proposedChange: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to either (a) formally include these modules with their roles and interfaces, or (b) explicitly mark them as out-of-scope so they can be removed. This will resolve the 22% architecture gap and unblock accurate compliance tracking.
